# Project Introduction

## Overview

This document outlines UBUNIFU SACCO's strategic project to establish a **Digital Financial Inclusion Platform** targeting underserved communities in peri-urban and rural Kenya.

## Project Title

*"Empowering Communities Through Digital Financial Inclusion: A SACCO-Led Approach"*

## Objectives

1. Expand digital financial access to 5,000 new members by 2026
2. Deploy mobile-first savings and credit tools
3. Build financial literacy among target communities
4. Strengthen SACCO governance and compliance systems

## Project Duration

**36 months** (January 2025 - December 2027)

## Funding

| Source | Amount (KES) | % |
|---|---|---|
| Member Equity | 5,000,000 | 25% |
| Grant Funding | 10,000,000 | 50% |
| Development Loan | 5,000,000 | 25% |
| **Total** | **20,000,000** | **100%** |
